props.name: allowNewRecord
props.desc: Show a button to create a new record from within the picker.

props.name: buttons
props.desc: Custom toolbar buttons shown in the picker modal.

props.name: displayEntityKey
props.desc: Entity property used as the display label in the selected value chip.

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type to pick from (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person').

props.name: filters
props.desc: JSON Logic filter expression applied to the picker's entity list (see jsonlogic.com).

props.name: footerButtons
props.desc: Footer button definitions for the picker modal.

props.name: incomeCustomJs
props.desc: Transform the incoming stored value before displaying it in the picker.

props.name: items
props.desc: Column definitions for the picker table.

props.name: modalFormId
props.desc: Form shown in the picker modal.

props.name: modalSettings
props.desc: Configuration for the 'Add new record' modal.

props.name: modalTitle
props.desc: Title shown in the picker modal header.

props.name: modalWidth
props.desc: Picker modal width as pixels or CSS string (e.g. '80%').

props.name: mode
props.desc: Single-select or multi-select mode.

props.name: outcomeCustomJs
props.desc: Transform the picked entity before storing it on the form.

props.name: submitHttpVerb
props.desc: HTTP method used when submitting from the picker modal.

props.name: valueFormat
props.desc: Shape of the stored value when an entity is selected.

props.name: additionalProperties
props.desc: Extra key-value properties passed to the entity form ({ key, value } pairs).

props.name: buttons
props.desc: Custom footer buttons (used when footerButtons is 'custom').

props.name: displayProperty
props.desc: Entity property shown as the clickable label.

props.name: displayType
props.desc: How the reference link is rendered.

props.name: entityReferenceType
props.desc: Interaction mode when the user clicks the reference.

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person').

props.name: footerButtons
props.desc: Which footer buttons to render in the dialog.

props.name: formIdentifier
props.desc: Form used for navigate/dialog/quickview.

props.name: formSelectionMode
props.desc: Whether the form is resolved by name or dynamically by entity type.

props.name: formType
props.desc: Form type hint used when formSelectionMode is 'dynamic'.

props.name: getEntityUrl
props.desc: URL to fetch the entity details from.

props.name: handleFail
props.desc: Enable the onFail action handler.

props.name: handleSuccess
props.desc: Enable the onSuccess action handler.

props.name: iconName
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown when displayType is 'icon'.

props.name: modalTitle
props.desc: Title shown in the dialog header.

props.name: modalWidth
props.desc: Dialog width as pixels or CSS string (e.g. '80%').

props.name: onFail
props.desc: Action executed when the form submission fails (requires handleFail: true).

props.name: onSuccess
props.desc: Action executed when the form submission succeeds (requires handleSuccess: true).

props.name: quickviewWidth
props.desc: Quickview panel width as pixels or CSS string.

props.name: skipFetchData
props.desc: Skip fetching entity data even when query parameters are available (useful for shared create/edit forms).

props.name: submitHttpVerb
props.desc: HTTP method used when submitting the modal form.

props.name: textTitle
props.desc: Custom text shown when displayType is 'textTitle'.

props.name: allowDelete
props.desc: Allow the user to delete uploaded files.

props.name: allowedFileTypes
props.desc: MIME types or extensions accepted (e.g. ['image/png', '.pdf']).

props.name: allowReplace
props.desc: Allow replacing an existing file with a new upload.

props.name: allowUpload
props.desc: Allow uploading new files.

props.name: hideFileName
props.desc: Hide the file name label beneath the upload button.

props.name: isDragger
props.desc: Render as a drag-and-drop upload zone instead of a button.

props.name: ownerId
props.desc: GUID of the owning entity record.

props.name: ownerType
props.desc: Entity class that owns the files (e.g. { name: 'Address', module: 'Shesha' }).

props.name: useSync
props.desc: Upload files synchronously rather than in the background.

props.name: allowAdd
props.desc: Allow uploading new attachments.

props.name: allowDelete
props.desc: Allow deleting attachments.

props.name: allowedFileTypes
props.desc: MIME types or extensions accepted (e.g. ['image/png', '.pdf']).

props.name: allowReplace
props.desc: Allow replacing an attachment with a new file.

props.name: allowRename
props.desc: Allow renaming attachments.

props.name: allowViewHistory
props.desc: Show the version history of each attachment.

props.name: customActions
props.desc: Extra action buttons shown in the toolbar.

props.name: customContent
props.desc: Render custom content inside each file item.

props.name: downloadedIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown on downloaded file items.

props.name: downloadZip
props.desc: Show a button to download all files as a zip archive.

props.name: extraFormId
props.desc: Form shown alongside each attachment for extra metadata.

props.name: filesCategory
props.desc: Category tag used to filter which files are shown.

props.name: filesLayout
props.desc: Layout direction of the file list.

props.name: hideFileName
props.desc: Hide the file name beneath each attachment item.

props.name: isDragger
props.desc: Render as a drag-and-drop upload zone instead of a button.

props.name: isDynamic
props.desc: Resolve owner ID and type dynamically at runtime.

props.name: listType
props.desc: How file items are displayed.

props.name: maxHeight
props.desc: Maximum height of the file list before it scrolls (e.g. '300px').

props.name: onDownload
props.desc: Called when a file is downloaded. Return value is ignored.

props.name: onFileChanged
props.desc: Called when the file list changes. Return value is ignored.

props.name: ownerId
props.desc: GUID of the owning entity record.

props.name: ownerName
props.desc: Display name of the owner (used as a folder label).

props.name: ownerType
props.desc: Entity class that owns the files (e.g. { name: 'Address', module: 'Shesha' }).

props.name: styleDownloadedFiles
props.desc: Apply downloadedFileStyles to items that have been downloaded.

props.name: thumbnailHeight
props.desc: Thumbnail height (e.g. '80px'). Used when listType is 'thumbnail'.

props.name: thumbnailWidth
props.desc: Thumbnail width (e.g. '80px'). Used when listType is 'thumbnail'.

props.name: allowDelete
props.desc: Allow the user to delete notes.

props.name: allowEdit
props.desc: Allow the user to edit existing notes.

props.name: autoSize
props.desc: Automatically grow the textarea to fit the content.

props.name: category
props.desc: Category tag used to group or filter notes.

props.name: maxLength
props.desc: Maximum character length for each note.

props.name: minLength
props.desc: Minimum character length required for each note.

props.name: onCreateAction
props.desc: Action name dispatched when a new note is created.

props.name: onDeleteAction
props.desc: Action name dispatched when a note is deleted.

props.name: onUpdateAction
props.desc: Action name dispatched when a note is updated.

props.name: ownerId
props.desc: GUID of the owning entity record.

props.name: ownerType
props.desc: Entity class that owns the files (e.g. { name: 'Address', module: 'Shesha' }).

props.name: savePlacement
props.desc: Position of the save button relative to the notes list.

props.name: showCharCount
props.desc: Show the character count below the input.
